name: Biden wins the popular vote? (Polymarket, popular-vote-winner-2024 event)
notes: PARTIAL ACQUISITION - the raw tape here is a BOUNDED SLICE (2024-06-01..2024-09-01), collected only to timestamp the Biden->Harris candidate switch. It is NOT the complete market history, so it will NOT reconcile against subgraph orderbook.tradesQuantity; combine with --allow-partial. kalshi_ticker POPVOTE-24-D is listed for schema completeness only - Kalshi did not list POPVOTE-24 until 2024-10-07, so there is NO Kalshi data in this window. Resolved NO (Biden withdrew 2024-07-21 and was never the nominee).
